series_metadata.series_description: Includes performance evaluations, original payroll action sheets, deduction authorizations, letters relating to job performance, job audits, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: Prior 2010, post-termination, relevant documents were microfilmed; microform records stored in LSC safe. Beginning in 2010, relevant documents scanned into PDF format; permanently stored in online-archive on LSC network. Paper copies and originals destroyed microform or electronic copy checked quality and completeness. ; Electronic: Prior 2010, post-termination, relevant documents were microfilmed; microform records stored in LSC safe. Beginning in 2010, relevant documents scanned into PDF format; permanently stored in online-archive on LSC network. Paper copies and originals destroyed microform or electronic copy checked quality and completeness. ; Paper: file each employee while employed by or on official leave from LSC. Keep as inactive file termination
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
